summary: Two main concerns are now addressed. 04_cross_sections_setup narration now states 'The base region lives flat in the xy-plane; each slice rises out of it perpendicular to the x-axis' — removes the misconception risk. 13_axis_choice narration now bridges to dy: 'swap every dee x for dee y' — gives the student the rule even without a worked dy example. Pause-silence narration length unchanged, but acceptable for solution-reveal context. Isoceles-right-triangle gap remains, accepted as out of scope. Ready to ship.
